title: reseda luteola subsp. gussonei
intro: Reseda luteola subsp. gussonei, also known as dyer's rocket, is a plant species in the genus Reseda, native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent, due to the presence of saponins and flavonoids. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for wound healing and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Reseda luteola subsp. gussonei include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
